reasoning_model_1: The audio content is '会议继续，刚才只是一个小插曲，大家不用在意。'. Critically, it omits the starting '咳咳' (Ahem) specified in the prompt script. model_comparison: Model 2 is significantly better than Model 1. Model 1 failed on Content Accuracy by omitting the '咳咳' characters entirely. Furthermore, Model 1's tone was flat and generic, lacking the specific 'feigned calmness' style requested; it just sounded like a normal reading.
